name: Dried Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Put fruit in a large pan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
2. Drain the fruit and coarsely chop it.
3. Combine the chopped fruit with sugar, nuts, and butter.
4. Roll out half of the pastry dough and line a pie plate.
5. Fill the pie shell with the fruit mixture, mounding in the center.
6. Top with a lattice crust.
7. Sprinkle the mixture of 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon over the top.
8. Bake in the bottom third of a preheated oven at 425°F for 30 minutes.
9. Reduce the heat to 375°F and bake for an additional 20 to 30 minutes.
